name: Aligned Genetics, Inc.
summary: Aligned Genetics, Inc., a biotech company, develops, manufactures, and sells imaging solutions for research institutions worldwide. The company offers solutions for automated cell counting, digital cell imaging, and tissue clearing and 3D imaging. It offers its solutions through distributors. The company was formerly known as Logos Biosystems, Inc. and changed its name to Aligned Genetics, Inc. in September 2020. Aligned Genetics, Inc. was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Anyang-si, South Korea.
